mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, goods_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{goodsId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.name, g.price, g.image, c.quantity, g.is_deleted FROM cart AS c JOIN goods AS g ON c.goods_id = g.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(g.price * c.quantity), 0) FROM ec_db.cart AS c INNER JOIN ec_db.goods AS g ON c.goods_id = g.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND g.is_deleted = 0
